User.title: User
User.description: Represents a citizen using the FloodGuard Connect app to request and track rescue services.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

name.description: The full name of the citizen.

phoneNumber.description: The citizen's primary contact phone number, used for login and OTP verification.

email.description: The citizen's primary contact email address, used for login and OTP verification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

RescueTeam.title: RescueTeam
RescueTeam.description: Represents an organized group of rescue personnel responding to emergencies.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RescueTeam entity.

name.description: The official name of the rescue team (e.g., 'Red Cross Team Alpha').

region.description: The geographic region where the team primarily operates.

status.description: The current operational status of the team (e.g., 'Available', 'Deployed', 'Standby').

verificationStatus.description: The administrative verification status of the team (e.g., 'Pending', 'Verified', 'Rejected').

currentLocationLatitude.description: The current latitude coordinate of the rescue team's primary position.

currentLocationLongitude.description: The current longitude coordinate of the rescue team's primary position.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the rescue team record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the rescue team record was last updated.

RescueTeamMember.title: RescueTeamMember
RescueTeamMember.description: Represents an individual member belonging to a rescue team.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RescueTeamMember entity.

rescueTeamId.description: Reference to the RescueTeam this member belongs to.

name.description: The full name of the rescue team member.

email.description: Email address for the team member, used for login.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number for the team member.

role.description: The role or specialization of the member within the team.

status.description: The current personal status of the team member.

currentLocationLatitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the rescue team member's position.

currentLocationLongitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the rescue team member's position.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the team member record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the team member record was last updated.

EmergencyTicket.title: EmergencyTicket
EmergencyTicket.description: Represents a distress call or emergency request raised by a citizen.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EmergencyTicket entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who raised this emergency ticket.

assignedRescueTeamId.description: Optional reference to the RescueTeam assigned to this ticket.

reportedLocationLatitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the emergency's reported location.

reportedLocationLongitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the emergency's reported location.

reportedLocationAddress.description: Human-readable address or landmark of the reported emergency.

pincode.description: The pincode of the reported emergency location.

manualLocationInput.description: Indicates if the location was manually entered.

numberOfPeople.description: The number of people affected at the emergency location.

emergencyTypes.description: An array of specific types of emergency needs.

additionalNotes.description: Any additional details or context provided by the user.

priority.description: The system-assigned priority level for the ticket.

status.description: The current status of the emergency ticket.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the emergency ticket was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the emergency ticket was last updated.

definition.description: Stores all emergency tickets with static coordinate data.
